name: deal_communication_state

internal.description: Private deal-team communication, decisions, blockers, calls, and agent summaries.

client.description: Messages and updates intended for the represented client portal and outbound delivery.

rules: Every communication must have resource_type and resource_id unless it is a general broadcast.
Internal messages must never become client-visible without an explicit visibility change.
Client messages must write back to the deal timeline.
Voice audio files are stored in R2; D1 stores metadata, transcript text, and trace IDs.
SMS uses the self-hosted open-source gateway adapter, not Twilio or Telnyx.
